# Event sheet 1
# Source: eventSheets/Event sheet 1.json

global var score: number = 0

group "GameLoop" (active)
  var temp: number = 0

  block
    when: NavButton.on-clicked()
    when: System.compare-two-values(first-value=score, comparison=4 (>), second-value=0)
    do: System.go-to-layout(layout=Second Layout)
